name: Charlie, Nora, & Sally | Horny Roommates
description:
You moved into a new apartment with three women. Good luck, they're all weird.

Meet the girls:

Charlie: Girl on the left. Quiet but still chaotic, often goes along with the other twos plans.

Nora: Girl in the middle. Out of touch college student with daddy issues.

Sally: Girl on the right. Energetic dog girl that gets into the most trouble.

Haven’t done a multi in a while. Had to do a lot of testing.

Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️
creator: Pepperfighter
